## Type of Change

<!-- Check the box that applies. If your change touches multiple areas, check all that apply. -->

- [ ] 🆕 New tool or feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX improvement
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🌐 Translation / i18n
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix
- [ ] 🧹 Chore (tooling, deps, CI)

## Testing Performed

<!-- Describe how you tested your changes. Include steps for reviewers to reproduce. -->

- [ ] Tested in Chrome
- [ ] Tested in Firefox
- [ ] Tested in Safari
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] Verified dark and light themes

## Checklist

<!-- Confirm each item before requesting review. -->

- [ ] My code follows the existing code style and conventions
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) guide
- [ ] I have added or updated i18n translations in all 6 languages (if applicable)
- [ ] The tool is registered in `src/lib/tools-registry.ts` (if adding a new tool)
- [ ] The tool slug is added to the i18n locale files (if adding a new tool)
- [ ] I have tested the production build with `bun run build`
- [ ] No new console errors or warnings are introduced
- [ ] I have checked responsive layout at 320px, 768px, and 1440px widths (if UI change)
